params.name: White Satin Sachet
params.description: This is a sachet used to store herbs, with a white satin base and silk thread embroidery along the edges. The front is made of dark blue floral silk with embroidered flower and plant patterns using gold thread, giving it a lifelike appearance. The back is double-layered blue cotton fabric, tightly fixed with a technique called "inverted three-needle", where the silk thread and fabric are closely integrated. It is a testament to the wisdom and hard work of ancient Chinese laboring people.
